data.content:
### getInfo()

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.5.2/sandbox/page.mdx

Retrieves information about the sandbox, including its ID and lifecycle dates.

```APIDOC
## getInfo()

### Description
Get sandbox information like sandbox ID, template, metadata, started at/end at date.

### Method
`getInfo(opts?: Pick<SandboxOpts, "requestTimeoutMs">): Promise<SandboxInfo>`

### Endpoint
N/A (Method on Sandbox instance)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
None

#### Request Body
None

#### Parameters
- **opts** (`Pick<SandboxOpts, "requestTimeoutMs">`) - Optional - Connection options, specifically the request timeout in milliseconds.

### Request Example
```ts
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create()
const info = await sandbox.getInfo()
console.log(info.sandboxId)
```

### Response
#### Success Response
- **sandboxInfo** (`SandboxInfo`) - An object containing detailed information about the sandbox.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "sbox_abc123",
  "template": "Node.js",
  "metadata": {},
  "startedAt": "2023-10-27T10:00:00Z",
  "endedAt": null
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Create Sandbox API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v1.9.0/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance, either from the default template or a specified one.

```APIDOC
## POST /sandbox/create

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/sandbox/create

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **template** (string) - Optional - The name or ID of the sandbox template to use. If not provided, the default 'desktop' template is used.
- **opts** (object) - Optional - Connection options for the sandbox.
  - **display** (string) - Optional - Display identifier.
  - **dpi** (number) - Optional - Dots per inch (DPI) setting for the display.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "example": {
    "template": "my-custom-template",
    "opts": {
      "dpi": 120
    }
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandboxId** (string) - The unique identifier of the newly created sandbox instance.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "example": {
    "sandboxId": "sandbox_abc123xyz"
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox Creation API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v1.7.2/sandbox/page.mdx

API endpoints for creating new sandbox instances.

```APIDOC
## POST /api/sandbox/create

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance. Can use a default template or a specified one.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/api/sandbox/create

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **template** (string) - Optional - The name or ID of the sandbox template to use. If not provided, the default 'desktop' template is used.
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional - Connection options for the sandbox environment.
  - **display** (string) - Optional - Display identifier.
  - **dpi** (number) - Optional - Dots per inch (DPI) setting for the display.
  - **resolution** (array) - Optional - The screen resolution in pixels, specified as `[width, height]`.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "template": "my-custom-template",
  "opts": {
    "resolution": [1920, 1080]
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandboxId** (string) - The unique identifier for the newly created sandbox instance.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-1234-567890abcdef"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox getInfo()

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v1.13.1/sandbox/page.mdx

Retrieves detailed information about the sandbox.

```APIDOC
## GET /sandboxes/{sandboxId}/info

### Description
Gets information about the sandbox, including its ID, template, metadata, and timestamps.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/sandboxes/{sandboxId}/info

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- **sandboxId** (string) - Required - The ID of the sandbox.

#### Query Parameters
- **requestTimeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Timeout for the request.

### Request Example
```ts
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create()
const info = await sandbox.getInfo()
console.log(info)
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandboxId** (string) - The unique identifier of the sandbox.
- **template** (string) - The template used to create the sandbox.
- **metadata** (object) - Any metadata associated with the sandbox.
- **createdAt** (string) - ISO 8601 timestamp when the sandbox was created.
- **startedAt** (string) - ISO 8601 timestamp when the sandbox started.
- **exitedAt** (string | null) - ISO 8601 timestamp when the sandbox exited, or null if still running.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "your-sandbox-id",
  "template": "node_runtime",
  "metadata": {},
  "createdAt": "2023-10-27T10:00:00Z",
  "startedAt": "2023-10-27T10:00:05Z",
  "exitedAt": null
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox getInfo API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.1/sandbox/page.mdx

Retrieves basic information about a specific sandbox, such as its ID, template, and timestamps.

```APIDOC
## GET /api/sandboxes/{sandboxId}/info

### Description
Retrieves basic sandbox information.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/api/sandboxes/{sandboxId}/info

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- **sandboxId** (string) - Required - The ID of the sandbox.

#### Query Parameters
- **opts** (object) - Optional - Connection options.
  - **user** (string) - Optional - User for accessing files.
  - **useSignatureExpiration** (number) - Optional - Expiration time for the signature in seconds.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "opts": {
    "user": "my-user"
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **SandboxInfo** (object) - An object containing sandbox information (sandbox ID, template, metadata, start/end dates).

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "sandbox-123",
  "templateId": "template-abc",
  "metadata": {},
  "startedAt": "2023-10-27T09:00:00Z",
  "endAt": "2023-10-27T10:00:00Z"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox Creation API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v1.6.0/sandbox/page.mdx

API endpoints for creating new sandbox instances.

```APIDOC
## create() API (Default Template)

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from the default `desktop` sandbox template.

### Method
N/A (Static method)

### Endpoint
N/A (Static method)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
None

#### Request Body
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional - Connection options.

### Request Example
```typescript
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create();
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** - A sandbox instance for the new sandbox.

#### Response Example
```typescript
// Returns a sandbox instance
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create();
```
```

```APIDOC
## create() API (Specific Template)

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template.

### Method
N/A (Static method)

### Endpoint
N/A (Static method)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
None

#### Request Body
- **template** (string) - Required - The sandbox template name or ID.
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional - Connection options.

### Request Example
```typescript
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create('<template-name-or-id>');
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** - A sandbox instance for the new sandbox.

#### Response Example
```typescript
// Returns a sandbox instance
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create('my-custom-template');
```
```

--------------------------------

### Create Sandbox API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.5.0/sandbox_async/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance. You can specify a template, timeout, metadata, environment variables, and authentication details.

```APIDOC
## POST /sandboxes

### Description
Creates a new sandbox. By default, it uses the 'base' template. You can customize its behavior with various optional parameters.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/sandboxes

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **template** (string) - Optional - Sandbox template name or ID.
- **timeout** (integer) - Optional - Timeout for the sandbox in seconds. Defaults to 300. Maximum is 86,400 seconds (24 hours) for Pro users and 3,600 seconds (1 hour) for Hobby users.
- **metadata** (object) - Optional - Custom metadata for the sandbox.
- **envs** (object) - Optional - Custom environment variables for the sandbox.
- **api_key** (string) - Optional - E2B API Key for authentication. Defaults to `E2B_API_KEY` environment variable.
- **domain** (string) - Optional - Domain to use for the API request.
- **debug** (boolean) - Optional - Enables debug mode.
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.
- **proxy** (object) - Optional - Proxy to use for the request and for requests made to the sandbox.
- **secure** (boolean) - Optional - If true, the environment is secured with an access token.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "template": "my-custom-template",
  "timeout": 600,
  "metadata": {"user_id": "123"},
  "envs": {"MY_VAR": "my_value"}
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (201 Created)
- **sandbox_id** (string) - The ID of the newly created sandbox.
- **instance_url** (string) - The URL to interact with the sandbox.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandbox_id": "sandbox-12345",
  "instance_url": "https://sandbox-12345.e2b.dev"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox API - Get Sandbox Info

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.5.0/sandbox_async/page.mdx

Retrieves detailed information about a specific sandbox using its ID.

```APIDOC
## GET /sandboxes/{sandbox_id}

### Description
Gets information about a specific sandbox.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/sandboxes/{sandbox_id}

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- **sandbox_id** (str) - Required - The unique identifier of the sandbox.

#### Query Parameters
- **api_key** (str) - Optional - API key for authentication.
- **domain** (str) - Optional - Domain for self-hosted environments.
- **debug** (bool) - Optional - Enable debug mode.
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.
- **headers** (Dict[str, str]) - Optional - Additional headers.
- **proxy** (ProxyTypes) - Optional - Proxy to use for the request.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandbox_info** (SandboxInfo) - An object containing detailed information about the sandbox.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandbox_info": {
    "id": "sandbox-123",
    "status": "running",
    "ip_address": "192.168.1.100"
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox Management API

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v2.0.1/sandbox_async/page.mdx

Core API for creating, managing, and querying the status of E2B sandboxes.

```APIDOC
## POST /sandboxes/create

### Description
Creates a new E2B cloud sandbox. This is the primary method for initiating a sandbox environment.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/sandboxes/create

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **opts** (object) - Optional - Options for configuring the sandbox (e.g., template, environment variables).
  - **template** (string) - Optional - The template to use for the sandbox.
  - **env_vars** (object) - Optional - Environment variables to set in the sandbox.
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **AsyncSandbox** (object) - An object representing the newly created sandbox, providing access to its modules (files, commands, pty).

### Request Example
```json
{
  "template": "Node.js",
  "env_vars": {
    "API_KEY": "your_api_key"
  }
}
```

### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandbox_id": "sbx_abcdef123456",
  "files": { ... },
  "commands": { ... },
  "pty": { ... }
}
```

## GET /sandboxes/{sandbox_id}/is_running

### Description
Checks if a specific sandbox is currently running.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/sandboxes/{sandbox_id}/is_running

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- **sandbox_id** (string) - Required - The unique identifier of the sandbox.
#### Query Parameters
- **request_timeout** (float) - Optional - Timeout for the request in seconds.

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **boolean** (boolean) - `True` if the sandbox is running, `False` otherwise.

### Request Example
*(This endpoint is typically called internally by the SDK)*

### Response Example
```json
true
```
```
